# Bravo Points Manager - Project Setup

## Project Overview
Bravo Points Manager application with Node.js backend and React frontend for managing employee evaluations.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Scaffold the Backend Project
- [x] Scaffold the Frontend Project
- [x] Set up Database Schema
- [x] Implement Backend API Endpoints
- [x] Create React Frontend Components
- [x] Install Dependencies and Test

## Project Structure
- `/backend` - Node.js Express API server
- `/frontend` - React + Vite application

## ✅ Setup Complete!

All core functionality is implemented. To run the application:

1. Make sure MongoDB is running
2. Update `backend/.env` with your OpenAI API key
3. Start backend: `cd backend && npm run dev`
4. Start frontend: `cd frontend && npm run dev`
5. Open http://localhost:3000
